title: Takara Premix Ex Taq Probe qPCR
description: Takara probe-based 25 uL qPCR (RR390): 30 sec 95 C hot-start, fast 2-step cycling, no melt curve.

payload.notes: Probe-based (5' nuclease hydrolysis probe) chemistry, so there is no melt curve. Fast 2-step protocol. Primers 0.2 uM each final (optimize 0.1-1.0 uM); probe final 0.1-0.5 uM (refer to your probe data sheet). Keep the initial denaturation at 95 C 30 sec. Values shown are for the Thermal Cycler Dice 25 uL setup (no ROX). On Applied Biosystems cyclers use a 20 uL reaction (10 uL premix, 0.4 uL each primer, 0.8 uL probe, 2 uL template, water to 20) plus ROX Reference Dye (1X) on the 7300/StepOnePlus, or ROX Reference Dye II (0.5X) on the 7500/7500 Fast. 30-45 cycles. Source: Takara Premix Ex Taq (Probe qPCR) (RR390A) product manual, https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/RR390A/RR390A_UM.pdf
